creator: gjb@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Steve Wills from comment #4)
> I think this is fixed, see r501581 and r502800.

I thought so, too.

> I think adding
> DEFAULT_VERSIONS=python=2.7 to the GCE image build environment and/or
> switching to USES=python:2.7 would be incorrect.

With the change from ler@, the information in comment 3 shows correct behavior.

> Can you confirm which
> version of py-google-compute-engine you're using?

 # make -V PKGVERSION
 2.8.16
